key_findings: Scanned 8 records across office_supplies (5) and communication (3) expense types.
Found 3 over-limit groups, all belonging to employee E9001 (开发员工甲):
- 2025-01 office_supplies: 960.00元 (2 records) exceeds 600元 threshold by 360.00元
- 2025-04 office_supplies: 650.00元 (1 record) exceeds 600元 threshold by 50.00元
- 2025-09 communication: 340.00元 (2 records) exceeds 300元 threshold by 40.00元
No special_approval exemptions found on any over-limit record — all have special_approval=0.
R900001 and R900002 share the same invoice (FPDEV900001), indicating potential split claim in 2025-01.
E9001 is the only employee with violations; E9002 and all communication-only months (2025-03) are compliant.
